features.featureTitle: Update the subscription hook (useSubscription.ts) to define two subscription tiers — Free and Premium — with product identifiers 'studiora_monthly' ($3.99/month) and 'studiora_yearly' ($29.99/year). Premium status must be persisted locally in localStorage and restored on app launch. The hook must expose: current plan, isPremium flag, subscribeToPlan(productId), restorePurchases(), and cancelSubscription().

Implement a simulated Google Play Billing integration layer in a new utility file (frontend/src/utils/googlePlayBilling.ts). Since the app runs as a web SPA on ICP and cannot call native Android APIs, this layer must: (1) simulate the billing flow with a Promise-based API matching Google Play Billing's interface (initBillingClient, launchBillingFlow, acknowledgePurchase, queryPurchases), (2) on successful purchase simulation, return a purchase token and set premium status, (3) on failure/cancellation, reject with an error message 'Payment cancelled or failed.', (4) queryPurchases must check localStorage for existing purchases to support restore flow.

Redesign the PaywallScreen component (frontend/src/components/PaywallScreen.tsx) to display: (1) title 'Upgrade to Studiora Premium', (2) a feature list showing all premium benefits with icons (Unlimited study plans, Advanced analytics, Smart study insights, Advanced focus modes, Detailed statistics, Custom themes, Export reports), (3) two plan selection cards — Monthly ($3.99/month) and Yearly ($29.99/year with 'Best Value' badge softly highlighted), (4) a primary CTA button 'Continue with Google Play' that triggers the billing flow for the selected plan, (5) a secondary 'Restore Purchases' button, (6) on successful purchase: unlock premium, close the paywall, and display a toast/confirmation message 'Premium unlocked. Stay focused.', (7) on failed purchase: display 'Payment cancelled or failed.' inline without closing the modal.

Update the PremiumGate component (frontend/src/components/PremiumGate.tsx) and UpgradePrompt component (frontend/src/components/UpgradePrompt.tsx) to show a soft, non-blocking upgrade prompt when a free user attempts to access a premium feature. The prompt text must read: 'Available in Premium to enhance your study experience.' The prompt must open the PaywallScreen and must never block navigation away from the current page or prevent use of free features.

Update the SubscriptionContext (frontend/src/contexts/SubscriptionContext.tsx) to incorporate the Google Play Billing utility and expose: isPremium, currentPlan ('free' | 'monthly' | 'yearly'), subscribeToPlan, restorePurchases, and cancelSubscription. On app initialization, automatically call queryPurchases to restore any existing premium status from localStorage, mirroring the 'restore on reinstall' behavior.

Update free-tier feature access: ensure the following features are fully accessible without premium — create/manage study plans, add tasks and subjects, daily study schedule, basic progress tracking, basic focus timer (Pomodoro with standard intervals), local device storage, and progress summary. Ensure premium gates are only applied to: advanced analytics (AdvancedStatisticsSection), AI/smart insights (AIInsightsPanel, SmartStudyInsightsCard), advanced focus settings (AdvancedFocusSettings), custom themes beyond the first 3 (ThemeSelectorSection), and export study reports.
